name: Coastal Calm
flavorHeadline: Sun-ripened Florida tomatoes, crisp poblano, bright cilantro, fresh lime
heatDescriptor: A gentle gust — all flavor, little fire
jarImageAlt: Jar of Tomato Warning Coastal Calm EF-1 salsa with a golden-yellow label
productStory: Golden hour. The window is open, the air still carries salt, and the sky hasn't decided what it's doing yet. Coastal Calm lives in that moment — sun-ripened Florida tomatoes, crisp poblano, cilantro you can smell before you taste it, and a squeeze of fresh lime that pulls everything bright. Every ingredient is visible in the jar and honest on the tongue. 500 to 1,500 SHU — a whisper of warmth, nothing more. This is not the absence of power. It is power at rest.
pairings: Fresh oysters on the half shell
